name: nuxt4-fullstack-portfolio
description: nuxt 4 production ready battle tested full stack portfolio with socket.io nginx dockerized pinia storing motions with gsap and capacitor for mobiles and electron for desktops
author: Bader Idris <contact@baderidris.com> (http://baderidris.com/)

scripts.old:prebuild: bunx prisma migrate deploy && bunx prisma generate --schema ./server/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.migrate:deploy: npx prisma migrate deploy --schema=./server/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=./server/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.dev: pnpm prebuild && cross-env IS_DEBUGGING=true nuxt dev
scripts.dev:prod: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NODE_ENV=production IS_DEBUGGING=false nuxt dev --dotenv .env.production
scripts.dev:electron: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NUXT_SSR=false IS_ELECTRON=true NUXT_GZIP=false IS_DEBUGGING=true ELECTRON_ENABLE_LOGGING=true ELECTRON_ENABLE_STACK_DUMPING=true DEBUG=electron:*,vite:electron:*,nuxt-electron:* nuxt dev
scripts.build:electron: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 NUXT_SSR=false IS_ELECTRON=true NUXT_GZIP=false nuxi build --prerender --dotenv .env.electron && electron-builder --config=./electronAssets/builder/config.js
scripts.build:electron:all: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 NUXT_SSR=false IS_ELECTRON=true NUXT_GZIP=false nuxi build --prerender --dotenv .env.electron && electron-builder --config=./electronAssets/builder/config.js -wml
scripts.build:electron:win: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 NUXT_SSR=false IS_ELECTRON=true NUXT_GZIP=false nuxi build --prerender --dotenv .env.electron && electron-builder --config=./electronAssets/builder/config.js --windows
scripts.build:electron:mac: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 NUXT_SSR=false IS_ELECTRON=true NUXT_GZIP=false nuxi build --prerender --dotenv .env.electron && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config=./electronAssets/builder/config.js  --mac
scripts.build:electron:linux: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 NUXT_SSR=false IS_ELECTRON=true NUXT_GZIP=false nuxi build --prerender --dotenv .env.electron && electron-builder --config=./electronAssets/builder/config.js --linux
scripts.build:electron:dir: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 NUXT_SSR=false IS_ELECTRON=true NUXT_GZIP=false nuxi build --prerender --dotenv .env.electron && electron-builder --config=./electronAssets/builder/config.js --dir
scripts.dev:electrobun: concurrently "pnpm prebuild && cross-env NUXT_SSR=false IS_ELECTROBUN=true NUXT_GZIP=false nuxt dev" "electrobun dev --watch"
scripts.build:electrobun: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NUXT_SSR=false IS_ELECTROBUN=true NUXT_GZIP=false nuxi build --prerender --dotenv .env.electron && electrobun build --env=stable && bun scripts/electrobun-build-helper.ts
scripts.build:electrobun:all: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NUXT_SSR=false IS_ELECTROBUN=true NUXT_GZIP=false nuxi build --prerender --dotenv .env.electron && cross-env BUILD_TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M) pnpm run build:electrobun:win:only && pnpm run build:electrobun:mac:only && pnpm run build:electrobun:linux:only && bun scripts/electrobun-build-helper.ts
scripts.build:electrobun:win: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NUXT_SSR=false IS_ELECTROBUN=true NUXT_GZIP=false nuxi build --prerender --dotenv .env.electron && electrobun build --env=stable --os=win && bun scripts/electrobun-build-helper.ts
scripts.build:electrobun:mac: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NUXT_SSR=false IS_ELECTROBUN=true NUXT_GZIP=false nuxi build --prerender --dotenv .env.electron && electrobun build --env=stable --os=macos && bun scripts/electrobun-build-helper.ts
scripts.build:electrobun:linux: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NUXT_SSR=false IS_ELECTROBUN=true NUXT_GZIP=false nuxi build --prerender --dotenv .env.electron && electrobun build --env=stable --os=linux && bun scripts/electrobun-build-helper.ts
scripts.generate: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NUXT_GZIP=false IS_CAPACITOR=true nuxt generate --dotenv .env.capacitor
scripts.generate:cap:pnpm: pnpm prebuild && cross-env NUXT_GZIP=false IS_CAPACITOR=true nuxt generate --dotenv .env.capacitor && pnpm cap sync && pnpm cap open android
scripts.prepare: [ "$DOCKER_BUILD" = "true" ] && echo 'Bypassing development prepare' || (npx skilld prepare || true)
